/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/MonitorWallGRPCClient.dir/test/GRPCClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MonitorWallGRPCClient.dir/src/MonitorWall.grpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/MonitorWallGRPCClient.dir/src/MonitorWall.pb.cc.o  -o MonitorWallGRPCClient  /usr/local/lib/libgrpc++.a /usr/local/lib/libgrpc++_reflection.a /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.a /usr/local/lib/libgrpc++.a /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.a /usr/local/lib/libgrpc.a /usr/local/lib/libssl.a /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.a /usr/local/lib/libgpr.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_str_format_internal.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_strings.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_throw_delegate.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_strings_internal.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_base.a -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libabsl_dynamic_annotations.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_spinlock_wait.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.so /usr/local/lib/libabsl_int128.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_bad_optional_access.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.a /usr/local/lib/libabsl_log_severity.a /usr/local/lib/libupb.a /usr/local/lib/libz.a /usr/local/lib/libcares.a -lnsl /usr/local/lib/libaddress_sorting.a -ldl -lrt -lm -lpthread
